name: Hydration mismatch fix for browser extension html attributes
rootCause: Browser extension injected data-immersive-translate-page-theme on <html> before React hydration.
fix: Add suppressHydrationWarning to <html> in src/app/layout.tsx and keep body suppressHydrationWarning.
note: This suppresses known extension-added attribute mismatches on the root html element. It does not mask app logic errors inside normal component subtrees.
